html:
Exclusive to:

The Telipad is a Character-exclusive Structure craftable only by Wagstaff. It is found in the Tinkering Tab, and requires Gears, an Electrical Doodad and two Cut Stones to craft.

The Telipad is used in conjunction with the Telebrella to be able to teleport. It is placed at a set location and can be teleported to as long as the player is within a certain range, indicated by the blinking light on top of the Telebrella. If there are multiple telipads, you will teleport to the closest one. If a player is standing on a telipad, they will teleport to the second closest Telipad. This allows the player to create a system similar to wormholes if placed correctly.

Gallery

  • Telipad in a short film Along Came A Spider
Craftable ItemsStructures

–Walani

–Warly
“A teleport o' call.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS THE MAT O' ZOOMIES”
–Wilba
“Returny place”
–Wormwood
“A landing pad for a teleporter.”
–Wheeler

The '''Telipad''' is a [[Characters|Character]]-exclusive [[Structure]] craftable only by [[Wagstaff]]. It is found in the [[Tinkering Tab]], and requires [[Gears]], an [[Electrical Doodad]] and two [[Cut Stone]]s to craft.

The Telipad is used in conjunction with the [[Telebrella]] to be able to teleport. It is placed at a set location and can be teleported to as long as the player is within a certain range, indicated by the blinking light on top of the Telebrella. If there are multiple telipads, you will teleport to the closest one. If a player is standing on a telipad, they will teleport to the second closest Telipad. This allows the player to create a system similar to wormholes if placed correctly.
